title: verilog: fix buf/not primitives with multiple outputs

features.name: buf gate primitive with multiple outputs
features.description: Code should include a buf gate primitive instantiation with three or more arguments where the last terminal is the input and all preceding terminals are outputs per IEEE 1364-2005 section 7.3

features.name: not gate primitive with multiple outputs
features.description: Code should include a not gate primitive instantiation with three or more arguments where the last terminal is the input and all preceding terminals are outputs per IEEE 1364-2005 section 7.3
